Appearances:
Plaintiff San Francisco Housing Authority is present. Represented by Kendra Crawford.
Attorney Tony Ruch appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Shirley Collins is present.
Attorney Phillip R. Morgan representing the defendant through limited scope.

Litigants and counsel meet and confer re settlement discussions.

Plaintiff will file a dismissal of this case. Trial date vacated.
